Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

1:1 & Team Coaching

Excel in your business and career with Strategic Communication Coach, Dave Delaney.

Improve your clarity, confidence, and communication at work and in life.

Book a Complimentary 1:1 Discovery Call

Trusted by leaders at Google, LinkedIn, FedEx, UPS, and hundreds of growing organizations.

Communication shapes every opportunity in your career, from your relationships, your leadership, your impact, and the way people experience you.

I help professionals gain clarity, confidence, and direction so they can communicate better, follow through consistently, reduce overwhelm, and build work and lives that feel aligned.

My coaching integrates an ADHD-aware approach for clients who deal with distraction, overthinking, or high-intensity ideas — giving every type of thinker the tools to make meaningful progress.

“Dave’s a man of many talents: a master presenter, marketer, and coach with a wide and varied knowledge base. He can make the driest subject fun and interesting. The thing I admire most about Dave is his ability to relate to everyone.”
— Jay Perry, ACCG, MCAC, PCC — Professional Association of ADHD Coaches (PAAC) Board of Directors

Improve Your Communication, Improve Your Career

Most clients work with Dave on challenges like:

  • Clear, confident everyday communication
  • Difficult conversations with coworkers and stakeholders
  • Leadership presence and executive communication
  • Staying focused and following through
  • Improving emotional regulation and impulse management
  • Managing overwhelm and burnout
  • Strengthening workplace relationships
  • Increasing reliability and trust
  • Career clarity and next-step planning

1:1 Strategic Communication Coaching

Private coaching gives you dedicated, personalized support to improve how you communicate, lead, and move through your professional life.

You'll get:

  • Clear, empathetic listening
  • ADHD-aware strategies to reduce overwhelm and improve follow-through
  • Communication tools you can use immediately
  • Leadership development based on your goals
  • Accountability and support to stay focused
  • Feedback, practice, and real-world application
  • Guidance through career or identity transitions

Workplace & Team Coaching

If your organization needs help improving communication, collaboration, or culture, Dave offers custom coaching and workshops for leaders and teams. These programs help your people communicate clearly, work together more effectively, and understand diverse thinking styles, including those with ADHD. Learn more.

About Dave Delaney

Hi, I'm Dave Delaney — a communication strategist, speaker, published author, and coach who has spent more than 20 years helping people improve the way they work together.

I blend practical communication training with ADHD-aware coaching tools to help clients gain confidence, clarity, and momentum. My work has supported leaders and teams at Google, LinkedIn, FedEx, UPS, and hundreds of growing companies.

I also host and produce the ADHD Wise Squirrels podcast, where I share ADHD-aware strategies, stories, and conversations for communication, leadership, and everyday life.

Real testimonials, from actual humans, directly from LinkedIn.

Let's help you communicate with clarity, confidence, and purpose.

Free 'good fit' introduction coaching sessions are limited each month. Complete the form below to schedule yours now or join the waiting list when we're fully booked.

“I can directly attribute at least 70% of sales at my company to ideas and programs that Dave came up with or helped me manage.”
Phil Shmerling, SVP, Relationship Manager at Studio Bank
“I'll keep this short and to the point - spending time with Dave to glean his insights, perspective, and experience...is priceless. Dave is at the top of my list as a resource and advisor.”
Christopher Parks, Founder, CDO, SVP Business Development, Change Healthcare
“We cannot recommend him enough for anyone who is confused or overwhelmed on how to market your product or service digitally in a climate that seems to change daily.”
Suzanne C. Bowen, Founder and Creator of BarreAmped
“He is extremely knowledgeable about all aspects of digital media. He comes up with great ideas and knows how to implement them.”
Jean Spivey, Old Settler's Music Festival
“His advice was invaluable as he stretched me to think outside my comfort zone.”
Jim Cumbee, JD, MBA
“The results so far, double digit increase in traffic across all our social media platforms and website.”
Meryl Taylor, Chief Marketing Officer at Mark Zinder & Associates
Let's Get Started
“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Coaching
  • Presentations
  • Workshops
  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.

Futureforth
2517 Lebanon Road
Nashville, TN, USA
